prompt: The surface of Mars under a pink-hued sunrise, showcasing its rocky terrain and dust-filled atmosphere.
prompt_refined: A photorealistic wide shot of the Martian surface at sunrise. The sky is bathed in a distinct pink hue. The foreground and midground prominently feature rugged, rocky terrain with diverse rock formations. A dense, reddish-brown dust fills the atmosphere, creating a hazy, diffuse visibility.
